inline_comments.message:
Can you explain the reason for upgrading to this version?  

The AJSC (which is used as the container for many of our services) includes a number of libraries by default, and as a necessity, we are sometimes forced to use versions of libraries which match those included by AJSC.  

I don't know off-hand if this is one of those libraries, but I want to make sure there is a good reason for changing the version given the potential risk that it could break some of our AJSC-based services which make use of the logging library.
